sql.if: AND ( a.req_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.req_phon_num LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR b.plan_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.sql: a.id ,a.req_nm ,a.req_phon_num ,a.req_prod ,b.plan_name as reqProdNm ,GET_COMPANY_NM(b.host) AS planCompanyNm ,b.mno planMno ,a.req_date ,a.req_sp ,a.create_date ,a.create_id ,GET_WEB_USER_NM(a.create_id) as createNm ,a.modified_date ,a.modified_id ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(a.modified_id) as modifiedNm ,b.normal_price ,b.sale_price ,b.after_price ,b.promotion_period ,b.link_url ,b.url_smt ,a.sale_plan_id
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_plan_req_mng a LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_pmb_plan_list b ON a.req_prod = b.id WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY a.create_date DESC
SELECT count(1) FROM tb_pmb_plan_req_mng a LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_pmb_plan_list b ON a.req_prod = b.id WHERE 1=1

SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_plan_req_mng a LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_pmb_plan_list b ON a.req_prod = b.id WHERE a.id=#{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_pmb_plan_req_mng SET req_nm=#{reqNm}, req_phone_num=#{reqPhoneNum}, req_prod=#{reqProd}, req_date=#{reqDate}, modified_id=#{modifiedId}, modified_date=NOW() WHERE id=#{id};
